mapper.sql: id, parent_id, `level`, `name`, slug, icon, description, cover_image, sort, article_count, is_recommend, is_nav, `status`, seo_title, seo_keywords, seo_description, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into category (parent_id, `level`, `name`, slug, icon, description, cover_image, sort, article_count, is_recommend, is_nav, `status`, seo_title, seo_keywords, seo_description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{slug,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{coverImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{articleCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isRecommend,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isNav,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seoTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seoKeywords,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seoDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

`level`,

mapper.update:
update category
parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`level` = #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
slug = #{slug,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
icon = #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cover_image = #{coverImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
article_count = #{articleCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
is_recommend = #{isRecommend,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_nav = #{isNav,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
seo_title = #{seoTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
seo_keywords = #{seoKeywords,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
seo_description = #{seoDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update category set parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `level` = #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, slug = #{slug,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, icon = #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cover_image = #{coverImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, article_count = #{articleCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, is_recommend = #{isRecommend,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_nav = #{isNav,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, seo_title = #{seoTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, seo_keywords = #{seoKeywords,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, seo_description = #{seoDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
